reports.name: html-validate
reports.description: W3C-style HTML validity — duplicate IDs, bad nesting, missing required attrs.

reports.name: seo-meta
reports.description: Required SEO + social meta tags for production sites.

warnings.message: meta description length 46 is outside recommended 50-170 chars

reports.name: assets
reports.description: Images have alt/width/height; videos have autoplay/muted/loop/playsinline + poster.

reports.name: structure
reports.description: Required page structure — nav, footer, exactly one <h1>, no lorem ipsum, no unfilled placeholders.

reports.name: links
reports.description: Broken internal anchors, dead href/src targets. External HTTP checks opt-in via CHECK_EXTERNAL=1.
